chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1095 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Direction 1. For orders on CMA No.5336/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.5337/2019 (151 CPC) 11.09.2019 Ms. Amber Iqbal, Advocate for the applicant / petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. After hearing learned counsel for the petitioner, urgent application is allowed mainly on the ground that petitioner Jameel Ahmed Qureshi intends to surrender before the trial Court. 2. Through the instant application, petitioner Jameel Ahmed Qureshi seeks further extension of order in protective bail in Reference No.07/2016 mainly on the ground that his air ticket has been confirmed in Flight No. FZ-333 departing on 12th September 2019 at 07:30 hours from Dubai and arriving at Karachi on the same day at 10:40 hours. It is further submitted that the petitioner could not arrive at Pakistan after obtaining protective bail on 28.08.2019 as his booking was not confirmed by Dubai Airlines. Counsel for the petitioner along with statement has placed on record copy of the booking confirmation ticket. Protective bail already granted to the petitioner vide order dated 28.08.2019 for 10 days is further extended up to 17th September 2019, on same terms and conditions. In case, the petitioner fails to surrender before concerned Court in the aforesaid period, his surety shall be forfeited. In the view of above, CMA No.5337/2019 is allowed in the above terms. Let the copy of this order be sent to the Secretary, Ministry of Interior, Government of Pakistan, Islamabad by fax for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
